title: Fog Distance Settings with Transition
description: Distance fog settings that include transition fog support (primarily for water).

fog_start.title: Fog Start
fog_start.description: The distance at which fog begins. For render distance type, this is a percentage (0.0-1.0). For fixed type, this is in blocks.

fog_end.title: Fog End
fog_end.description: The distance at which fog is fully opaque. For render distance type, this is a percentage (0.0-1.0). For fixed type, this is in blocks.

fog_color.title: Fog Color
fog_color.description: The color of the fog as a hex string (e.g., '#ABD2FF') or RGB array.

render_distance_type.title: Render Distance Type
render_distance_type.description: How fog distances are calculated. 'fixed' uses block distances, 'render' uses percentage of render distance.

transition_fog.title: Transition Fog
transition_fog.description: Settings for fog transition when entering this environment.

init_fog.title: Initial Fog
init_fog.description: The initial fog settings when entering transition.

defaultSnippets.label: Fog Distance Settings
defaultSnippets.description: Distance fog settings for a specific environment type (air, water, lava, etc.).

min_percent.title: Minimum Percent
min_percent.description: The minimum fog percentage during transition.

mid_seconds.title: Mid Seconds
mid_seconds.description: Time in seconds to reach the mid-point of the transition.

mid_percent.title: Mid Percent
mid_percent.description: The fog percentage at the mid-point of transition.

max_seconds.title: Max Seconds
max_seconds.description: Total time in seconds for the full transition.

defaultSnippets.label: Fog Transition
defaultSnippets.description: Settings for fog transition when entering this environment.
